Uses of Package
com.github.dakusui.actionunit

  • Packages that use com.github.dakusui.actionunit 
    Package Description
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit  
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors  
  • Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit used by com.github.dakusui.actionunit 
    Class and Description
    Action
    Defines interface of an action performed by ActionUnit runner.
    Action.Base
    A base class of all Actions.
    Action.Composite
    A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Action.Sequential or Action.Concurrent.
    Action.Concurrent
    A class that represents a set of actions that should be executed sequentially.
    Action.Concurrent.Factory 
    Action.Leaf
    Any action that actually does any meaningful operation outside "ActionUnit" framework should extend this class.
    Action.RepeatIncrementally 
    Action.Retry 
    Action.Sequential
    A class that represents a sequence of actions that should be executed one after another.
    Action.Sequential.Factory 
    Action.TimeOut 
    Action.Visitor
    A visitor of actions, in the style of the visitor design pattern.
    Action.WithTarget.Factory 
    Actions
    This class contains static utility methods that return objects of type Action.
    Block
    Executes an operation based on an input value.
    Utils
    A utility class for static methods which are too trivial to create classes to which they should belong.
  • Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit used by com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors 
    Class and Description
    Action
    Defines interface of an action performed by ActionUnit runner.
    Action.Concurrent
    A class that represents a set of actions that should be executed sequentially.
    Action.Leaf
    Any action that actually does any meaningful operation outside "ActionUnit" framework should extend this class.
    Action.RepeatIncrementally 
    Action.Retry 
    Action.Sequential
    A class that represents a sequence of actions that should be executed one after another.
    Action.TimeOut 
    Action.Visitor
    A visitor of actions, in the style of the visitor design pattern.
    Action.Visitor.Base
